framework.name: Nonce-Based Replay Attack Prevention
framework.description: Both protocols mandate a unique nonce field in each signature, cached by Cloudflare to detect reuse. This provides time-window replay protection in addition to created/expires timestamps, ensuring requests cannot be copied and resubmitted even within validity period.
framework.raw_quote: Agents must also include the nonce field, a unique sequence included in the signature, to provide protection against replay attacks... By checking if a nonce has been recently used, Cloudflare can reject reused or expired signatures

source.title: Securing agentic commerce: helping AI Agents transact with Visa and Mastercard
